title: Office Supply Notice
passage:
To all staff,

Starting next month, office supplies will be ordered through the new internal request form. The form is available on the company portal and should be submitted by Thursday afternoon for delivery the following week. This change is intended to reduce duplicate orders and help the administration team track monthly expenses more accurately.

If your department needs an item urgently, please contact the administration desk before submitting the form.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the notice?

choices.text: To announce a new ordering procedure

questions.explanation: 本文では、来月から社内申請フォームで備品を注文する変更が案内されています。

questions.prompt: When should the request form be submitted for delivery the following week?

choices.text: At the end of each month

questions.explanation: 本文に should be submitted by Thursday afternoon と明記されています。

title: Internal Memo 1
passage:
To all team members,

The office will update its inventory procedure next month. The new process is designed to make daily work easier and reduce repeated requests. Team leaders will explain the details during a short meeting on Tuesday morning. Staff members who cannot attend should read the summary posted on the internal portal.

Please send any questions to the administration desk by Friday afternoon.

questions.prompt: What is the memo mainly about?

choices.text: A change to the inventory procedure

questions.explanation: 本文は inventory 手順の更新について説明しています。

questions.prompt: By when should questions be sent?
questions.explanation: 本文末に by Friday afternoon と明記されています。

title: Customer Service Desk Move
passage:
To all employees,

The customer service desk will move from the first floor to the north side of the lobby on July 8. The new location will give visitors a clearer path from the main entrance and reduce crowding near the elevators. Signs will be placed in the lobby during the first week of the change.

Staff members who regularly meet visitors should review the updated floor map on the company portal before Friday.

questions.prompt: What is the notice mainly about?
questions.explanation: 本文では customer service desk がロビー北側へ移動すると説明されています。

questions.prompt: What should some staff members do before Friday?
questions.explanation: 本文末に review the updated floor map ... before Friday とあります。

title: Online Order Policy
passage:
Dear team,

Beginning next Monday, customers who place online orders will receive a confirmation message before their items are prepared. The message will include the pickup time, the order number, and any notes from the store. This step is intended to reduce cancelled orders caused by incorrect pickup dates.

For orders of more than $100, the usual handling fee will be waived automatically at checkout.

questions.prompt: Why is the confirmation message being added?
questions.explanation: 本文に reduce cancelled orders caused by incorrect pickup dates とあります。

questions.prompt: When will the handling fee be waived?

choices.text: When an order is picked up early
When an order is more than $100
When a customer calls the store
When a message is not received

questions.explanation: 本文末に For orders of more than $100, the usual handling fee will be waived とあります。

title: Maintenance Access Notice
passage:
To employees in the east wing,

Technicians will inspect the ventilation system above the workstations on Wednesday morning. To give the technicians enough space, please remove personal items from the top shelves before leaving on Tuesday. Computers and chairs do not need to be moved.

Employees who need a quiet place during the inspection may use the temporary work area in Training Room B.

questions.prompt: Why are employees asked to clear the top shelves?

choices.text: To help technicians reach the ventilation system
To make room for training materials

questions.explanation: 換気設備の点検のため、技術者が作業できるスペースを確保する必要があると読み取れます。

questions.prompt: Where can employees work during the inspection?
questions.explanation: 本文末に temporary work area in Training Room B とあります。

title: Training Schedule Update
passage:
To all branch managers,

The product knowledge training originally planned for June 12 has been moved to June 19. The change was necessary because the large conference room will be used for a regional sales meeting on the original date. The training agenda and instructor will remain the same.

Please remind your team members to confirm their attendance through the learning portal by Monday.

questions.prompt: Which session has been moved?
questions.explanation: 本文冒頭に product knowledge training が June 19 に変更されたとあります。

questions.prompt: Why was the date changed?

choices.text: The instructor is unavailable all month
The conference room is needed for another meeting
The agenda has not been approved

questions.explanation: 本文に the large conference room will be used for a regional sales meeting とあります。

title: Invoice Payment Reminder
passage:
Dear Ms. Ortega,

This is a reminder that invoice 4587 for the design consultation is due on May 30. The invoice was sent to your accounting department on May 10, along with a copy of the final project summary. Payment can be made by bank transfer or by credit card through the client portal.

If payment has already been completed, please disregard this message.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the message?

choices.text: To remind a client about a payment

questions.explanation: 本文は支払期限が近い請求書について知らせるリマインダーです。

questions.prompt: What should Ms. Ortega do if payment has already been made?
questions.explanation: 本文末に If payment has already been completed, please disregard this message とあります。

title: Employee Referral Program
passage:
To all staff,

Human Resources has reopened the employee referral program for the customer support department. Staff members may recommend candidates by submitting the referral form and the candidate's resume through the HR portal. The bonus is available only if the referred candidate is hired and completes the first 90 days of employment.

The referral form must be submitted before the candidate applies directly on the company Web site.

questions.prompt: What condition must be met for an employee to receive the bonus?

choices.text: The resume must be mailed to customers
The job opening must be cancelled
The candidate must complete 90 days of employment

questions.explanation: 本文に hired and completes the first 90 days of employment とあり、採用後90日勤務することが条件です。

questions.prompt: When must the referral form be submitted?
questions.explanation: 本文末に before the candidate applies directly on the company Web site とあります。

title: Shipping Delay Update
passage:
Dear customer,

Your order of replacement display panels has been delayed because the shipment is undergoing an additional customs inspection. We now expect the panels to leave the port on Thursday and arrive at our warehouse early next week. You will receive a tracking number as soon as the warehouse team scans the shipment.

If this delay affects a scheduled installation, contact your account representative to discuss a temporary rental option.

questions.prompt: Why has the shipment been delayed?

choices.text: It was sent to the wrong customer
It has not been ordered yet
It is being inspected by customs

questions.explanation: 本文に undergoing an additional customs inspection とあります。

questions.prompt: What can the customer discuss if the delay affects an installation?
questions.explanation: 本文末に contact your account representative to discuss a temporary rental option とあります。

title: Meeting Room Booking
passage:
To all employees,

The booking process for conference rooms has been updated. Starting July 1, employees must reserve rooms through the calendar tool instead of sending requests to the reception desk. Reservations made before July 1 will remain valid and do not need to be entered again.

Please cancel any room you no longer need so that other teams can use the space.

questions.prompt: What will employees use to reserve conference rooms?
questions.explanation: 本文に reserve rooms through the calendar tool とあります。

questions.prompt: What is stated about reservations made before July 1?

choices.text: They must be paid for in advance
They must be approved by reception

questions.explanation: 本文に Reservations made before July 1 will remain valid とあります。

title: Supplier Survey Request
passage:
Dear purchasing team,

Please complete the supplier evaluation survey by the end of the month. The survey asks about delivery accuracy, product quality, response time, and billing clarity. Your answers will help the purchasing department decide which suppliers should be invited to next quarter's contract discussions.

If you worked with more than one supplier this month, submit a separate survey for each one.

questions.prompt: What is one topic included in the survey?
questions.explanation: 本文に delivery accuracy が調査項目の一つとして挙げられています。

questions.prompt: Why will the purchasing department use the survey answers?

choices.text: To choose suppliers for contract discussions

questions.explanation: 本文に decide which suppliers should be invited to next quarter's contract discussions とあります。

title: Cafeteria Menu Trial
passage:
To building tenants,

The cafeteria will test a new lunch menu during the first two weeks of August. The trial menu will include several vegetarian dishes and a smaller set of daily specials. Prices will remain the same during the trial period.

Comment cards will be available near the cashier, and feedback collected during the trial will be reviewed before the final menu is selected.

questions.prompt: What will the cafeteria test in August?
questions.explanation: 本文冒頭に test a new lunch menu とあります。

questions.prompt: How can tenants provide feedback?
questions.explanation: 本文に Comment cards will be available near the cashier とあります。

title: Payment Schedule Memo
passage:
To department coordinators,

Beginning July 1, vendor invoices will be paid every Wednesday instead of on the last business day of the month. Please submit approved invoices to the accounting folder by 3:00 P.M. on Monday so the payment list can be checked before processing. Receipts for small purchases should still be uploaded within two business days.

The new schedule is intended to reduce late-payment fees and give vendors a more predictable timeline. Questions about missing documents should be sent to payments@westbridge.example.

questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of the memo?

choices.text: To announce a new payment schedule
To introduce a new accounting manager

questions.explanation: 本文冒頭で vendor invoices will be paid every Wednesday とあり、支払い日程の変更を知らせるメモです。

questions.prompt: When should approved invoices be submitted?
questions.explanation: 本文に by 3:00 P.M. on Monday とあります。

questions.prompt: What should still be uploaded within two business days?
questions.explanation: 本文に Receipts for small purchases should still be uploaded within two business days とあります。

questions.prompt: What can be inferred about the previous payment schedule?

choices.text: It sometimes made vendor payments less predictable
It required invoices to be checked on Wednesdays
It was designed for small purchases only
It was managed by vendors directly

questions.explanation: 新しい日程の目的が vendors に a more predictable timeline を与えることなので、以前は予測しにくい面があったと推測できます。

title: Customer Support Shift Update
passage:
Team members,

Customer Support will extend its weekday phone coverage from 6:00 P.M. to 8:00 P.M. for six weeks after the launch of the new ordering portal. The evening shift will be staffed by two representatives from the online services group and one representative from billing. A draft rotation has been posted on the staff dashboard.

Anyone who needs to trade an assigned evening shift should contact his or her supervisor by Friday. The schedule will be finalized next Monday, and no changes will be accepted after that date except for emergencies.

questions.prompt: What change is being announced?

choices.text: The ordering portal will be removed
Weekday phone coverage will be extended

questions.explanation: 本文に Customer Support will extend its weekday phone coverage とあります。

questions.prompt: How long will the extended coverage last?

choices.text: Until the end of the year
For six weeks after the launch

questions.explanation: 本文に for six weeks after the launch of the new ordering portal とあります。

questions.prompt: Who should contact a supervisor by Friday?

choices.text: Customers who cannot use the portal
Employees who need to trade an evening shift

questions.explanation: 本文に Anyone who needs to trade an assigned evening shift should contact his or her supervisor by Friday とあります。

questions.prompt: What can be inferred about the schedule after next Monday?

choices.text: It will be posted for the first time
It will be managed by customers
It will usually be considered final

questions.explanation: next Monday に final となり、その後の変更は緊急時を除いて受け付けないため、通常は確定扱いになると推測できます。

title: Packaging Supplier Notice
passage:
Dear Ms. Patel,

Thank you for asking about lighter packaging for the countertop mixers. Our new recycled shipping box is 18 percent lighter than the current box but has passed the same drop test. I have arranged for twelve samples to be delivered to your warehouse this Thursday.

Please test the samples with your standard inserts and let us know by May 22 whether you would like a price quote for the first production order. If you decide to proceed, we can begin regular shipments in late June.

Sincerely,
Daniel Cho

questions.prompt: What product is the supplier discussing?
questions.explanation: 本文に Our new recycled shipping box とあります。

questions.prompt: Why will samples be delivered?

choices.text: So the supplier can repair a warehouse door
So customers can receive free mixers
So a catalog can be mailed to stores
So they can be tested with standard inserts

questions.explanation: 本文に Please test the samples with your standard inserts とあります。

questions.prompt: By when should Ms. Patel respond about a price quote?
questions.explanation: 本文に let us know by May 22 whether you would like a price quote とあります。

questions.prompt: What can be inferred about the current shipping box?

choices.text: It is heavier than the new option
It failed the supplier's drop test
It cannot be used with inserts
It will be delivered this Thursday

questions.explanation: 新しい箱が current box より 18 percent lighter とあるため、現行の箱は新しい選択肢より重いと分かります。

title: Training Enrollment Reminder
passage:
To all department managers,

Registration for the Practical Leadership Workshop closes at 5:00 P.M. on September 9. The workshop is intended for employees who recently began supervising a team or are expected to do so within the next year. Managers must approve each nomination before the training office can reserve a seat.

Because the room holds only twenty participants, additional nominees will be placed on a waiting list. Confirmation notices will be sent on September 12, after the training office reviews all approved requests.

questions.prompt: What is the reminder mainly about?
questions.explanation: 本文冒頭に Registration for the Practical Leadership Workshop closes とあります。

questions.prompt: Who is the workshop intended for?

choices.text: Customers who recently bought office equipment
Employees who supervise or may soon supervise a team

questions.explanation: 本文に employees who recently began supervising a team or are expected to do so within the next year とあります。

questions.prompt: What must managers do before a seat can be reserved?
questions.explanation: 本文に Managers must approve each nomination before the training office can reserve a seat とあります。

questions.prompt: Why might some nominees be placed on a waiting list?

choices.text: The room holds only twenty participants
Confirmation notices have already been sent

questions.explanation: 本文に Because the room holds only twenty participants, additional nominees will be placed on a waiting list とあります。

title: Invoice Submission Procedure
passage:
To all department assistants,

Beginning August 1, all vendor invoices must be sent to accounting@northbridge.example. Please include the purchase order number in the subject line. Invoices that arrive without this information may be [1] until the department confirms the order.

If a supplier asks about payment status, direct the supplier to the accounting portal rather than replying from a personal mailbox. This procedure is intended to [2] duplicate inquiries and keep payment records in one place. Department assistants should also upload any signed delivery receipts, [3] accounting staff can match them with the invoice.

The finance office will review the first month of submissions and [4] minor adjustments if needed.

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [1]?
questions.explanation: Invoices are delayed という受け身の形になるため、過去分詞 delayed が適切です。

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [2]?
questions.explanation: is intended to の後には動詞の原形が続くため reduce が適切です。

questions.prompt: Which phrase best completes blank [3]?
questions.explanation: 領収書をアップロードする目的を表すため so that が適切です。

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [4]?
questions.explanation: will review and make の並列になるため、動詞の原形 make が適切です。

title: Delivery Window Notice
passage:
Notice to shipping partners,

The loading area behind Building C will be [1] closed on July 6 while the pavement is repaired. Drivers should use Gate 2 for all morning deliveries. The usual entrance will reopen at noon [2] the repair crew expects the work to take only four hours.

Extra carts will be [3] near Gate 2 to help drivers move packages to the receiving desk. Please remind drivers to check in with security before unloading any items.

[4]

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [1]?
questions.explanation: closed を修飾する副詞が必要なため temporarily が適切です。

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [2]?
questions.explanation: 正午に再開できる理由を説明しているため because が適切です。

questions.prompt: Which word best completes blank [3]?

title: Remote Work Request Policy
passage:
To all employees,

Employees who have completed three months of service are [1] to request a remote work arrangement for up to two days per week. Each request requires manager [2] and must include a brief explanation of how customer service coverage will be maintained.

Requests should be submitted at least two weeks in advance [3] an emergency makes advance notice impossible. After the first month of remote work, Human Resources recommends that a revised schedule [4] if team coverage needs to be adjusted.

Beginning July 8, visitors must check in with the tablet at the front desk before receiving a temporary badge. The system will send each host an automatic notification once a guest has arrived. passage:
To all employees,

The color printer on the fourth floor will be unavailable from 1 P.M. to 4 P.M. on Wednesday while a technician replaces several worn parts. Documents that require color printing should be sent to the third-floor printer [1] the maintenance begins.

The replacement parts are expected to improve print quality and reduce paper jams. Please avoid opening the printer panels during the service period, [2] the technician may need to restart the device several times.

If your department has an urgent print request, contact the facilities desk. A staff member [3] the file to another printer if needed. [4]
